notes: These presets are for synthetic and simulated datasets used to benchmark anomaly detection, cross-survey alignment, and calibration workflows.
They should be ingested as evidence-only or synthetic benchmark inputs, not as direct observational support for council decisions.
Claude API usage in this repo is prompt-bounded; online knowledge must be fetched explicitly by Manatuabon and then supplied to the model.

openuniverse.name: openuniverse2024
openuniverse.description: OpenUniverse 2024 simulated Roman and Rubin imaging benchmark for anomaly detection and cross-survey validation.
openuniverse.command: d:/Manatuabon/.venv/Scripts/python.exe openuniverse_snapshot_importer.py --dataset openuniverse2024 --inbox D:/Manatuabon/data --db D:/Manatuabon/manatuabon.db --agent-log D:/Manatuabon/agent_log.json --ingest
openuniverse.catalog_anomaly_command_template: d:/Manatuabon/.venv/Scripts/python.exe cross_survey_catalog_anomaly_worker.py --left <roman_catalog.csv> --right <rubin_catalog.csv> --truth <truth_catalog.csv> --left-name Roman --right-name Rubin --truth-name Truth --max-sep-arcsec 1.0 --inbox D:/Manatuabon/data --db D:/Manatuabon/manatuabon.db --agent-log D:/Manatuabon/agent_log.json --ingest
openuniverse.catalog_pipeline_command_template: d:/Manatuabon/.venv/Scripts/python.exe openuniverse_catalog_pipeline.py --roman <roman_export.json> --rubin <rubin_export.json> --truth <truth_export.json> --out-dir D:/Manatuabon/data --normalized-format both --max-sep-arcsec 1.0 --db D:/Manatuabon/manatuabon.db --agent-log D:/Manatuabon/agent_log.json --ingest
